desc: rsync copy with aggregate progress bar
doc:
rcp <src> <dest>
Uses --info=progress2 --no-inc-recursive --stats
Best for large transfers where you want a single progress bar

desc: rsync move with aggregate progress bar (removes source)
rsync update — skip newer files on receiver
doc:
rup <src> <dest>
Uses -avu --progress — only copies files that are newer on the source

desc: rsync sync — update + delete extraneous files on receiver
doc:
rsy <src> <dest>
Uses -avu --delete --progress — mirrors source to dest, removing extras
Destructive: deletes files on dest that don't exist on source
